lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That beast would probably bite my fingers off if I tried to pet it.

lines.speaker: Ali the Camel
lines.text: If you want me to bite your fingers off, you're going the right way about it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not going to pet that! It will probably bite my hand off, that filthy beast.

lines.speaker: Ali the Camel
lines.text: Watch who you're calling a filthy beast, human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmmm... you'd make a tasty kebab.

lines.speaker: Ali the Camel
lines.text: And you'd make an excellent spit bucket! Pchoo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not going to pet that nasty creature! I might get fleas... or worse!

lines.speaker: Ali the Camel
lines.text: You're fairly nasty yourself, human. When was the last time you took a shower?
